channel.title: Ratios on Dyson Sphere Program Guide
channel.description: Recent content in Ratios on Dyson Sphere Program Guide

item.title: DSP 60 Science Per Minute Blueprint (v0.10) - Full Production Ratios From Raw Materials to All Science
item.description:
Short answer: 60 SPM (all six science types) requires: 120 Iron Ore/min, 60 Copper Ore/min, 30 Coal/min, 30 Crude Oil/min, plus off-world Titanium and Silicon.

Iron ore

Copper ore
Total about 30 assemblers, 40 smelters, and 15 chemical plants. The single most important ratio is 3 Blue : 3 Red : 6 Yellow : 8 Purple : 12 Green : 15 White assemblers.

Science production is measured in science per minute (SPM). 60 SPM is the standard mid-game target - achievable on a single planet, enough to research most technologies at a reasonable pace. This guide covers every production chain from raw materials to completed science matrices.
